title: sciodaphyllum crassilimbum
intro: Sciodaphyllum crassilimbum, also known as the Cebu island tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sciodaphyllum crassilimbum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by making a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
